value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Execution kickoff: implementing attached telemetry+observability rollout in sequence (CLI consent/settings, telemetry runtime/exporter, tests, remote stack deployment on 192.168.1.183, Caddy domain wiring, backup/restore, and full E2E validation).

author: codex-agent

message: Link telemetry settings and prompt files

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Progress: added telemetry settings defaults/schema (enabled by default, capture_level=max, retention_days=365), config key telemetry-tracking (enabled|disabled), and first-run TTY consent prompt that persists global decision without affecting non-interactive/json/CI runs. Verification: pnpm build passed.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Progress: implemented telemetry runtime pipeline with command_start/command_finish events, key/value scrubbing for sensitive fields, pseudonymous installation/session identifiers, local JSONL queueing under global runtime path, retry backoff, and batched HTTPS exporter flush. Smoke checks in temporary PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH confirmed queue population and install_id persistence.

value.command: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/config-command.spec.ts tests/unit/settings-store.spec.ts tests/unit/telemetry-runtime.spec.ts tests/unit/telemetry-consent.spec.ts tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Verification evidence: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/config-command.spec.ts tests/unit/settings-store.spec.ts tests/unit/telemetry-runtime.spec.ts tests/unit/telemetry-consent.spec.ts tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts passed (5 files, 99 tests). ReadLints reports no new diagnostics on changed source/test files.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Remote deployment evidence (192.168.1.183): docker compose stack launched in /home/steve/container/pm-cli with telemetry-api, telemetry-worker, RabbitMQ, Postgres, Prometheus, Loki, Tempo, Alloy, Grafana and persistent volumes. Smoke validation: POST /v1/events accepted synthetic event; Postgres telemetry_events count=1 and telemetry_command_daily updated for command list-open.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Caddy domain wiring complete on 192.168.1.183: added pm.unbrained.dev -> http://192.168.1.183:13000 and pm-cli.unbrained.dev -> http://192.168.1.183:18080 in /home/steve/caddy/npm_proxy_hosts_extracted.json, executed ./scripts/generate-validate-reload.sh, and verified both local SNI checks (--resolve to 127.0.0.1) and public HTTPS responses for /api/health and /healthz.

author: codex-agent

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Backup/restore implemented on remote host: scripts/backup-all.sh captures Postgres dumps, RabbitMQ definitions + volume, Loki/Tempo/Grafana/Prometheus volume archives, and config tarballs with SHA256 manifest; scripts/restore-postgres.sh, restore-rabbitmq-definitions.sh, restore-volume.sh, and restore-drill.sh added. Automation: cron installed (daily backup 03:15, weekly restore drill Sunday 03:45). Validation: backup-all.sh succeeded, restore-drill.sh succeeded (telemetry_events=13, telemetry_command_daily=4), and RabbitMQ definitions restore test passed.

message: Record backup and restore implementation evidence

author: codex-agent

Executed init/create/list-open/get/close via node dist/cli.js; remote evidence: telemetry_events row count increased from 24 to 34 (+10), recent commands recorded start+finish events for init/create/list-open/get/close, RabbitMQ queue pm.telemetry.events drained to 0 ready/0 unacked, Prometheus pm_telemetry_ingested_events_total increased to 11, Loki query for container=pm-telemetry-api with '/v1/events' returned 10 log lines, and Tempo spans metric tempo_distributor_spans_received_total increased to 74.
